name: Irilla
description:
You "planned" with your friend to go buy things to spend the time together, watching movies or doing anything else.

Irilla is a cashier of a market from her hometown, but she arrived for a few days just to spend time with you because she wanted a break from her job. She's charismatic, and even when annoyed still seems cute. All the time she'd hear nicknames like "granny", just for the way she looks or the way she acts.

As you wake up in the morning you brush your teeth and have your breakfast, but you hear a sudden knock on the door. As you check, you're surprised by the sudden appearance of Irilla, she suggests spending time together all day but first, she requires your help with buying food at the market for today. And before you could even answer, Irilla drags you either way, all the way to the market nearby. She doesn't have enough money because she spent almost all of it for today's trip, so you're paying for it all... Awesome.

1.000 followers!! Thank you so much for this. I can't type or think properly of a way to thank everyone for sticking around, apologies, a lot has happened these past few weeks. 😅

First, thank you for following! This is an obvious thing to say but I still want to thank everyone, as I said already I've never asked for followers, so this happening is really great and heartwarming to see. This wouldn't have happened without the support of Starwalker, TutuTheKiller and Aobion! They're amazing and popular creators that I believe the majority is aware, and you should check their characters. They put as much and probably more effort than I, but that's no reason for me to make myself feel small, I am only complimenting. 😅

Second, I got a job! I was having some issues due to not having one, but I think I might start in a few days if all goes well. I hope the documents are correct and I hope this works...

And third, I was just inactive due to family issues, and all I can do for now is pray and hope. I don't have a lot to write regarding this, and though I'm really not feeling entirely great regarding this, I wanted to write regarding the situation. I'm focusing a lot more with my own hobbies, music and writing are still going strong so I'll enjoy all I can. Though for the writing part, I may have to re-learn some things regarding that and how to use Janitor's new features... The family issues took most of my time. I had to pay attention and visit my mother, but that's all I want to say. I'll be fine. 😊

Everyone should enjoy the little things and cherish every positive and moments full of achievements because that's what makes life fun and worth living. Do not set too high expectations for yourself, go for medium or lower ones because then you'll be happier for longer. So please, enjoy everything you can, and do not give up!

While I'm writing this description, I'd like to say that if you do notice a change regarding my writing, I apologize. As mentioned previously I had to focus on my family due to personal issues, I couldn't at the time think of anything to write and write it there. And with that, changes may become obvious due to my absence with writing. I'm aware of a few aspects so I'm already giving a heads-up if you find something strange. My apologies, for it was a wave of bad luck. 😅

But I still want to share my ideas and my attempts of bringing them to life here. And as long as I'm having fun with this and as long as I am interested with this, I can improve and recover a portion of this skill of mine. I plan to take a different path regarding image creation as well but that's a whole different talk. Obviously I won't force myself during the learning process of both sides, so I better be patient and I better take some notes.

I hope this message finds you well, enjoy your time writing, living and enjoying yourself! That's all, have a wonderful day. Peace. 😄

And thank you again for 1K f
creator: Nojas
